## Summary

What changed, and why?

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible UI changes. Use fictional demo data only.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Safety Check

- [ ] No real X handles, user ids, post ids, OAuth tokens, API keys, customer data, private URLs, or screenshots with secrets are included.
- [ ] Demo data remains fictional.
- [ ] Any setup, migration, or environment change is documented.
